home requires considerable and taxing effort and is
Clinical findings or services required ins support to patient's home health eligibility:
Education for safe use of assistive device
Perform at: Valley Health Specialty Hospital
Diagnosis: Shoulder Arthritis, Right - M19.011, M75.21
Procedure Description: right total shoulder arthroplasty
23430: tenodesis of long tendon of biceps
23472: arthroplasty, glenohumeral joint; total shoulder (glenoid and proximal humeral replacement (eg, total shoulder))
23333: removal of foreign body, shoulder; deep (subfascial or intramuscular)
Ancef 1 gram TXA at incision and another gram during closure
HPI: This is a 73 year old female who:
1. is being seen for a chief complaint of right shoulder. Toni presents today for right shoulder
She is scheduled for a right anatomic total shoulder arthroplasty on 04/14/26 at Valley
Reviewed and no changes noted April
Her pain is a 6 out of 10.
Reviewed and no changes noted April
Right upper extremity exam notable for the
Active forward flexion 90 degrees. 4 out of 5
rotator cuff strength testing. Positive Hawkins,
Reviewed and no changes noted April
Neer, empty can test. Positive mid arc pain
Reviewed and no changes noted April
Please refer to the education handout for detailed counseling.
Patient Specific Notes: Toni presents today for preoperative visit. She is scheduled for a
right anatomic total shoulder on April 14th at Valley Specialty Hospital. All questions
regarding surgery were answered. She was provided with a sling and post operative pain
medication. She will follow up 2 weeks after her surgery.
The right shoulder was braced with a ultrasling, Shoulder orthosis, abduction.
I recommend continued use of the orthosis until next follow up.
Initiate Treatment: Initiate treatment with prescription medication.
Based on Risk Selected: Low Risk (0-3 points)
Sig: Take 1 tab p.o. every 6 hours as needed pain
Quantity: 28 Tablet Earliest fill date: April 05, 2026
Follow up for: Further Evaluation and Management - 5 minutes. Other Instructions: 04/30 post
